Learn to Code With Confidence & Land Your Dream Job

coding_with_smile.py
# Coding With Smile 😊
# IT Training, Bhildi

class Student:
  def __init__(self):
    self.skills = []
    self.future = "bright"

  def enroll(self):
    return "Career starts NOW! 🚀"

me = Student()
print(me.enroll())
# Career starts NOW! 🚀

📚 Courses

Pick Your Course

All courses include certificate, flexible timings & FREE demo class. Online + Offline both available!

🐍
Python Programming
Variables, loops, functions, OOP, file handling & real-world projects. Most in-demand skill!
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹5,000
🌐
HTML / CSS / JS
Build stunning websites from scratch. HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript & responsive design.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹3,500
⚙️
C Programming
Foundation of all programming. Pointers, arrays, structures, file I/O & algorithms.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹4,000
🔷
C++ Programming
Object-oriented programming. Classes, inheritance, polymorphism & STL library.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹4,000
🐘
PHP Development
Server-side web development. PHP basics, MySQL integration, forms & session handling.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹4,500
💜
.NET Framework
Microsoft .NET development. C#, ASP.NET, Windows Forms & web applications.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹4,500
🗄️
SQL Database
Database management. Queries, joins, stored procedures, triggers & optimization.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹3,500
🔶
Oracle Database
Enterprise database. PL/SQL, Oracle architecture, performance tuning & administration.
⏱ 2-3 months 📅 1hr/day 🎓 Certificate
₹3,500
